original_image_tags: The back of a slightly aged, cream-colored document page. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge. The main body of the page is blank, showing only faint bleed-through of typed text from the reverse side. At the bottom, several blue ink stamps are visible, oriented upside-down relative to the page's primary reading direction.

elements.description: Multiple faded and reversed ink stamps on a plain, aged page. Two distinct sets of text are visible, though mirrored and partially illegible due to bleed-through. One stamp contains the legible text 'FBI' and 'REC'D-COND. & CARRS' above a date stamp 'JUL 15 4 30 PM '66'. Another stamp contains similar text with a date stamp 'JUL 13 8 50 AM '66'.

judge.reason: Both agree on the core visual elements (aged page, stamps), but Description B adds specific quoted stamp text ('FBI', dates) that Description A omits without contradiction.
